articles.title: Baywatch Set Photos: Brooks Nader, Livvy Dunne, Stephen Amell & More On The Beach - Yahoo Lifestyle Australia
articles.description: Brooks Nader, Stephen Amell,  Livvy Dunne, Shay Mitchell, Hassie Harrison, Noah Beck, Jessica Belkin and David Chokachi slip into the famous red swimsuits
articles.content:
It’s been years in the making, but the stars of the latest incarnation of Baywatch have finally slipped into their red swimsuits and begun filming.
Following an open casting call in Marina del Rey, … [+3974 chars]
